--- 
title: |
  Extended Data Table 6
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| label: library_data_imports

library(tidyverse)
library(table1)
library(gtsummary)
library(yingtools2)
source("utility_funcs.R")



nutrient_cols <- c("poly", "calor", "satfat", "monfat", "tfat", "trn11", 
                   "f205", "f226", "sodium", "alco", "whgrn", "prot", "aprot",
                   "aofib", "carbo", "sugtot")

gu_cohort_data <- readRDS("../data/gu_survey_cohort.RDS") %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(nutrient_cols), as.numeric))

# ==================================================================================
# WILLETT FFQ TO DIETARYINDEX PREPROCESSING SCRIPT
# ==================================================================================
source("AHEI_calculation.R")
source("Willett_to_dietaryindex_preprocessing.R")
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| echo: false
#| label: important_diet_functions



# ==================================================================================
# MASTER FUNCTION: Calculate all diet quality indices
# ==================================================================================

calculate_all_diet_indices <- function(gu_cohort_data) {
  
  cat("=====================================================\n")
  cat("  CALCULATING DIET QUALITY INDICES FROM WILLETT FFQ\n")
  cat("=====================================================\n\n")
  
  cat("Step 1: Computing food group servings from FFQ frequencies...\n")
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_food_servings(gu_cohort_data)
  
  cat("Step 2: Computing additional food group variables...\n")
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_additional_food_groups(gu_cohort_data)
  
  cat("Step 3: Calculating indices...\n\n")
  
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_AHEI_via_dietaryindex(gu_cohort_data)
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_HEI2015_via_dietaryindex(gu_cohort_data)
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_aMED(gu_cohort_data)
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_PDI(gu_cohort_data)
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_animal_score(gu_cohort_data)
  gu_cohort_data <- calculate_HFD(gu_cohort_data)
  
  cat("\n=====================================================\n")
  cat("  ALL INDICES COMPUTED SUCCESSFULLY\n")
  cat("=====================================================\n")
  
  return(gu_cohort_data)
}


# ==================================================================================
# ADDITIONAL FOOD GROUP CALCULATIONS
# ==================================================================================

calculate_additional_food_groups <- function(df) {
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      potato_servings =
        convert_freq_9level(ff.pot) +
        convert_freq_9level(pot),
      
      veg_oil_servings =
        convert_freq_11level(olive.oil),
      
      tea_coffee_servings =
        convert_freq_11level(tea) +
        convert_freq_11level(coff) +
        convert_freq_11level(decaf) +
        convert_freq_11level(herb.tea),
      
      animal_fat_servings =
        convert_freq_10level(bu) +
        convert_freq_9level(cream) +
        convert_freq_9level(cr.ch) +
        convert_freq_9level(ice.cr),
      
      misc_animal_servings =
        convert_freq_9level(mayo) +
        convert_freq_9level(mayo.d),
      
      total_veg_excl_potatoes = veg_servings,
      total_veg_incl_potatoes = veg_servings + potato_servings,
      total_fruit_with_juice = fruit_servings + fruit_juice_servings
    )
  
  return(df)
}


# ==================================================================================
# 1. AHEI-2010 (via dietaryindex package)
# ==================================================================================

calculate_AHEI_via_dietaryindex <- function(df) {
  
  cat("  [1/6] AHEI-2010 (via dietaryindex package)...\n")
  
  if (!require("dietaryindex", quietly = TRUE)) {
    cat("    Installing dietaryindex package...\n")
    if (!require("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("remotes")
    remotes::install_github("jamesjiadazhan/dietaryindex")
    library(dietaryindex)
  }
  
  prepared <- prepare_willett_for_dietaryindex(df)
  
  ahei_results <- AHEI(
    SERV_DATA              = prepared,
    RESPONDENTID           = prepared$RESPONDENTID,
    GENDER                 = prepared$GENDER,
    TOTALKCAL_AHEI         = prepared$TOTALKCAL_AHEI,
    VEG_SERV_AHEI          = prepared$VEG_SERV_AHEI,
    FRT_SERV_AHEI          = prepared$FRT_SERV_AHEI,
    WGRAIN_SERV_AHEI       = prepared$WGRAIN_SERV_AHEI,
    NUTSLEG_SERV_AHEI      = prepared$NUTSLEG_SERV_AHEI,
    N3FAT_SERV_AHEI        = prepared$N3FAT_SERV_AHEI,
    PUFA_SERV_AHEI         = prepared$PUFA_SERV_AHEI,
    SSB_FRTJ_SERV_AHEI     = prepared$SSB_FRTJ_SERV_AHEI,
    REDPROC_MEAT_SERV_AHEI = prepared$REDPROC_MEAT_SERV_AHEI,
    TRANS_SERV_AHEI        = prepared$TRANS_SERV_AHEI,
    SODIUM_SERV_AHEI       = prepared$SODIUM_SERV_AHEI,
    ALCOHOL_SERV_AHEI      = prepared$ALCOHOL_SERV_AHEI
  )
  
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(
      ahei_results %>% dplyr::select(c("RESPONDENTID", "AHEI_ALL")),
      by = c("record_id" = "RESPONDENTID")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(AHEI = "AHEI_ALL")
  
  cat("    Range: ", round(min(df$AHEI, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "-",
      round(max(df$AHEI, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  cat("    Mean:  ", round(mean(df$AHEI, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  
  return(df)
}


# ==================================================================================
# 2. HEI-2015 (via dietaryindex package)
# ==================================================================================

calculate_HEI2015_via_dietaryindex <- function(df) {
  
  cat("  [2/6] HEI-2015 (via dietaryindex package)...\n")
  
  if (!require("dietaryindex", quietly = TRUE)) {
    cat("    Installing dietaryindex package...\n")
    if (!require("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("remotes")
    remotes::install_github("jamesjiadazhan/dietaryindex")
    library(dietaryindex)
  }
  
  prepared <- prepare_willett_for_dietaryindex(df)
  
  # Build input data frame with column names expected by HEI2015()
  # 
  # DENSITY SCORING NOTES (HEI-2015 / HEI-2020):
  #   - Food group components: function densitizes internally, pass RAW daily amounts.
  #   - Added Sugars & Saturated Fat: pass as % of total energy (pre-computed).
  #   - Sodium: pass in GRAMS/day (not mg).
  #   - Fatty Acid Ratio: (MUFA+PUFA)/SFA, unitless ratio.
  #
  # ARGUMENT NAME NOTE: The dietaryindex package uses specific abbreviations:
  #   GREENNBEAN (not GREENSANDBEAN), WHOLEGRAIN (not WGRAIN),
  #   TOTALPRO (not TOTPROT), SEAPLANTPRO (not SEAPLANTPROT)
  hei_input <- data.frame(
    RESPONDENTID                = prepared$RESPONDENTID,
    TOTALKCAL_HEI2015          = prepared$TOTALKCAL_AHEI,
    TOTALFRT_SERV_HEI2015      = (df$fruit_servings + df$fruit_juice_servings) * 0.5,
    FRT_SERV_HEI2015           = df$fruit_servings * 0.5,
    VEG_SERV_HEI2015           = (df$veg_servings + df$legume_servings) * 0.5,
    GREENNBEAN_SERV_HEI2015    = prepared$GREENSANDBEAN_SERV_HEI,
    WHOLEGRAIN_SERV_HEI2015    = df$whgrn / 16,
    DAIRY_SERV_HEI2015         = prepared$DAIRY_SERV_HEI,
    TOTALPRO_SERV_HEI2015      = prepared$TOTALPROT_SERV_HEI,
    SEAPLANTPRO_SERV_HEI2015   = prepared$SEAPLANTPROT_SERV_HEI,
    REFINEDGRAIN_SERV_HEI2015  = prepared$REFINEDGRAIN_SERV_HEI,
    SODIUM_SERV_HEI2015        = df$sodium / 1000,
    ADDEDSUGAR_SERV_HEI2015    = prepared$ADDEDSUGARS_SERV_HEI,
    SATFAT_SERV_HEI2015        = prepared$SATFAT_SERV_HEI,
    FATTYACID_SERV_HEI2015     = prepared$FATTYACIDRATIO_HEI
  )
  
  # Call the dietaryindex HEI2015 generic function
  hei_results <- HEI2015(
    SERV_DATA                  = hei_input,
    RESPONDENTID               = hei_input$RESPONDENTID,
    TOTALKCAL_HEI2015          = hei_input$TOTALKCAL_HEI2015,
    TOTALFRT_SERV_HEI2015      = hei_input$TOTALFRT_SERV_HEI2015,
    FRT_SERV_HEI2015           = hei_input$FRT_SERV_HEI2015,
    VEG_SERV_HEI2015           = hei_input$VEG_SERV_HEI2015,
    GREENNBEAN_SERV_HEI2015    = hei_input$GREENNBEAN_SERV_HEI2015,
    WHOLEGRAIN_SERV_HEI2015    = hei_input$WHOLEGRAIN_SERV_HEI2015,
    DAIRY_SERV_HEI2015         = hei_input$DAIRY_SERV_HEI2015,
    TOTALPRO_SERV_HEI2015      = hei_input$TOTALPRO_SERV_HEI2015,
    SEAPLANTPRO_SERV_HEI2015   = hei_input$SEAPLANTPRO_SERV_HEI2015,
    REFINEDGRAIN_SERV_HEI2015  = hei_input$REFINEDGRAIN_SERV_HEI2015,
    SODIUM_SERV_HEI2015        = hei_input$SODIUM_SERV_HEI2015,
    ADDEDSUGAR_SERV_HEI2015    = hei_input$ADDEDSUGAR_SERV_HEI2015,
    SATFAT_SERV_HEI2015        = hei_input$SATFAT_SERV_HEI2015,
    FATTYACID_SERV_HEI2015     = hei_input$FATTYACID_SERV_HEI2015
  )
  
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(
      hei_results %>% select(c(RESPONDENTID, HEI2015_ALL)),
      by = c("record_id" = "RESPONDENTID")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(HEI_2015 = "HEI2015_ALL")
  
  cat("    Range: ", round(min(df$HEI_2015, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "-",
      round(max(df$HEI_2015, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  cat("    Mean:  ", round(mean(df$HEI_2015, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  
  return(df)
}


# ==================================================================================
# 3. aMED (Alternate Mediterranean Diet Score)
# ==================================================================================

calculate_aMED <- function(df) {
  
  cat("  [3/6] aMED...\n")
  
  df <- df %>%
    group_by(sex) %>%
    mutate(
      med_veg       = median(total_veg_excl_potatoes, na.rm = TRUE),
      med_fruit     = median(fruit_servings, na.rm = TRUE),
      med_nuts      = median(nut_servings, na.rm = TRUE),
      med_legumes   = median(legume_servings, na.rm = TRUE),
      med_wgrain    = median(whgrn, na.rm = TRUE),
      med_fish      = median(fish_servings, na.rm = TRUE),
      med_mufa_sfa  = median(monfat / pmax(satfat, 0.01), na.rm = TRUE),
      med_redmeat   = median(red_meat_servings, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      amed_veg      = ifelse(total_veg_excl_potatoes >= med_veg, 1, 0),
      amed_fruit    = ifelse(fruit_servings >= med_fruit, 1, 0),
      amed_nuts     = ifelse(nut_servings >= med_nuts, 1, 0),
      amed_legumes  = ifelse(legume_servings >= med_legumes, 1, 0),
      amed_wgrain   = ifelse(whgrn >= med_wgrain, 1, 0),
      amed_fish     = ifelse(fish_servings >= med_fish, 1, 0),
      amed_mufa_sfa = ifelse((monfat / pmax(satfat, 0.01)) >= med_mufa_sfa, 1, 0),
      amed_redmeat  = ifelse(red_meat_servings < med_redmeat, 1, 0),
      amed_alcohol  = case_when(
        sex == 2 & alco >= 5 & alco <= 15  ~ 1,
        sex == 1 & alco >= 5 & alco <= 25  ~ 1,
        TRUE ~ 0
      ),
      aMED = amed_veg + amed_fruit + amed_nuts + amed_legumes +
        amed_wgrain + amed_fish + amed_mufa_sfa +
        amed_redmeat + amed_alcohol
    )
  
  cat("    Range: ", min(df$aMED, na.rm = TRUE), "-",
      max(df$aMED, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("    Mean:  ", round(mean(df$aMED, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  
  return(df)
}


# ==================================================================================
# 4. PDI / hPDI / uPDI (Plant-Based Diet Indices)
# ==================================================================================

calculate_PDI <- function(df) {
  
  cat("  [4/6] PDI / hPDI / uPDI...\n")
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      pdi_whole_grains   = wholegrain_servings,
      pdi_fruits         = fruit_servings,
      pdi_vegetables     = veg_servings,
      pdi_nuts           = nut_servings,
      pdi_legumes        = legume_servings,
      pdi_veg_oils       = veg_oil_servings,
      pdi_tea_coffee     = tea_coffee_servings,
      pdi_fruit_juices   = fruit_juice_servings,
      pdi_refined_grains = refined_grain_servings,
      pdi_potatoes       = potato_servings,
      pdi_ssb            = ssb_servings,
      pdi_sweets         = sweets_servings,
      pdi_animal_fat     = animal_fat_servings,
      pdi_dairy          = dairy_servings,
      pdi_eggs           = egg_servings,
      pdi_fish_seafood   = fish_servings,
      pdi_meat           = red_meat_servings + poultry_servings,
      pdi_misc_animal    = misc_animal_servings
    )
  
  quintile_score <- function(x) {
    n <- length(x)
    n_zero <- sum(x == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (n_zero > 0.20 * n) {
      # Many zeros: assign 1 to zeros, split nonzeros into quartiles (2-5)
      scores <- rep(NA_real_, n)
      scores[x == 0] <- 1
      nonzero_idx <- which(x > 0)
      if (length(nonzero_idx) > 0) {
        q <- quantile(x[nonzero_idx], probs = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
        uq <- unique(c(-Inf, q, Inf))
        if (length(uq) >= 3) {
          n_bins <- length(uq) - 1
          top_labels <- seq(from = 5 - n_bins + 1, to = 5)
          scores[nonzero_idx] <- cut(x[nonzero_idx],
                                     breaks = uq,
                                     labels = top_labels, include.lowest = TRUE) %>%
            as.numeric()
        } else {
          # All nonzero values essentially the same; assign middle score
          scores[nonzero_idx] <- 3
        }
      }
      return(scores)
    } else {
      q <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.20, 0.40, 0.60, 0.80), na.rm = TRUE)
      uq <- unique(c(-Inf, q, Inf))
      if (length(uq) == 6) {
        # All breakpoints unique — standard quintiles
        scores <- cut(x, breaks = uq,
                      labels = 1:5, include.lowest = TRUE) %>%
          as.numeric()
        return(scores)
      } else {
        # Ties in breakpoints — fall back to dplyr::ntile()
        return(dplyr::ntile(x, 5))
      }
    }
  }
  
  food_groups <- c(
    "pdi_whole_grains", "pdi_fruits", "pdi_vegetables", "pdi_nuts",
    "pdi_legumes", "pdi_veg_oils", "pdi_tea_coffee",
    "pdi_fruit_juices", "pdi_refined_grains", "pdi_potatoes",
    "pdi_ssb", "pdi_sweets",
    "pdi_animal_fat", "pdi_dairy", "pdi_eggs", "pdi_fish_seafood",
    "pdi_meat", "pdi_misc_animal"
  )
  
  for (fg in food_groups) {
    df[[paste0("q_", fg)]] <- quintile_score(df[[fg]])
  }
  
  healthy_plant <- paste0("q_", c("pdi_whole_grains", "pdi_fruits", "pdi_vegetables",
                                  "pdi_nuts", "pdi_legumes", "pdi_veg_oils",
                                  "pdi_tea_coffee"))
  unhealthy_plant <- paste0("q_", c("pdi_fruit_juices", "pdi_refined_grains",
                                    "pdi_potatoes", "pdi_ssb", "pdi_sweets"))
  animal <- paste0("q_", c("pdi_animal_fat", "pdi_dairy", "pdi_eggs",
                           "pdi_fish_seafood", "pdi_meat", "pdi_misc_animal"))
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      PDI = rowSums(across(all_of(c(healthy_plant, unhealthy_plant)))) +
        rowSums(6 - across(all_of(animal))),
      hPDI = rowSums(across(all_of(healthy_plant))) +
        rowSums(6 - across(all_of(unhealthy_plant))) +
        rowSums(6 - across(all_of(animal))),
      uPDI = rowSums(6 - across(all_of(healthy_plant))) +
        rowSums(across(all_of(unhealthy_plant))) +
        rowSums(6 - across(all_of(animal)))
    )
  
  cat("    PDI  - Range: ", min(df$PDI, na.rm = TRUE), "-",
      max(df$PDI, na.rm = TRUE), ", Mean: ",
      round(mean(df$PDI, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  cat("    hPDI - Range: ", min(df$hPDI, na.rm = TRUE), "-",
      max(df$hPDI, na.rm = TRUE), ", Mean: ",
      round(mean(df$hPDI, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  cat("    uPDI - Range: ", min(df$uPDI, na.rm = TRUE), "-",
      max(df$uPDI, na.rm = TRUE), ", Mean: ",
      round(mean(df$uPDI, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")
  
  return(df)
}


# ==================================================================================
# 5. ANIMAL SCORE
# ==================================================================================

calculate_animal_score <- function(df) {
  
  cat("  [5/6] Animal score...\n")
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      animal_protein_pct = (aprot / pmax(prot, 0.01)) * 100,
      animal_energy_pct  = (aprot * 4 / calor) * 100,
      animal_score       = animal_protein_pct
    )
  
  cat("    Range: ", round(min(df$animal_score, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "-",
      round(max(df$animal_score, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "%\n")
  cat("    Mean:  ", round(mean(df$animal_score, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "%\n")
  
  return(df)
}


# ==================================================================================
# 6. HFD (US Healthy Food Diversity Index)
# ==================================================================================

calculate_HFD <- function(df) {
  
  cat("  [6/6] HFD (Healthy Food Diversity Index)...\n")
  
  hf <- list(
    fruit = 1.0, veg = 1.0, wholegrain = 1.0,
    dairy = 0.8, nuts_legumes = 0.9, fish = 0.9,
    poultry = 0.6, veg_oil = 0.7, tea_coffee = 0.5,
    red_meat = 0.2, refined_grain = 0.3, potatoes = 0.4,
    ssb = 0.1, fruit_juice = 0.3, sweets = 0.1,
    eggs = 0.5, animal_fat = 0.1, alcohol = 0.2
  )
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      kcal_fruit         = fruit_servings * 60,
      kcal_veg           = veg_servings * 25,
      kcal_wholegrain    = wholegrain_servings * 80,
      kcal_dairy         = dairy_servings * 120,
      kcal_nuts_legumes  = (nut_servings + legume_servings) * 170,
      kcal_fish          = fish_servings * 150,
      kcal_poultry       = poultry_servings * 180,
      kcal_veg_oil       = veg_oil_servings * 120,
      kcal_tea_coffee    = tea_coffee_servings * 2,
      kcal_red_meat      = red_meat_servings * 230,
      kcal_refined_grain = refined_grain_servings * 80,
      kcal_potatoes      = potato_servings * 150,
      kcal_ssb           = ssb_servings * 150,
      kcal_fruit_juice   = fruit_juice_servings * 110,
      kcal_sweets        = sweets_servings * 200,
      kcal_eggs          = egg_servings * 75,
      kcal_animal_fat    = animal_fat_servings * 100,
      kcal_alcohol       = (alco / 14) * 100,
      
      kcal_total_est = pmax(1,
                            kcal_fruit + kcal_veg + kcal_wholegrain + kcal_dairy +
                              kcal_nuts_legumes + kcal_fish + kcal_poultry + kcal_veg_oil +
                              kcal_tea_coffee + kcal_red_meat + kcal_refined_grain +
                              kcal_potatoes + kcal_ssb + kcal_fruit_juice + kcal_sweets +
                              kcal_eggs + kcal_animal_fat + kcal_alcohol),
      
      s_fruit         = kcal_fruit / kcal_total_est,
      s_veg           = kcal_veg / kcal_total_est,
      s_wholegrain    = kcal_wholegrain / kcal_total_est,
      s_dairy         = kcal_dairy / kcal_total_est,
      s_nuts_legumes  = kcal_nuts_legumes / kcal_total_est,
      s_fish          = kcal_fish / kcal_total_est,
      s_poultry       = kcal_poultry / kcal_total_est,
      s_veg_oil       = kcal_veg_oil / kcal_total_est,
      s_tea_coffee    = kcal_tea_coffee / kcal_total_est,
      s_red_meat      = kcal_red_meat / kcal_total_est,
      s_refined_grain = kcal_refined_grain / kcal_total_est,
      s_potatoes      = kcal_potatoes / kcal_total_est,
      s_ssb           = kcal_ssb / kcal_total_est,
      s_fruit_juice   = kcal_fruit_juice / kcal_total_est,
      s_sweets        = kcal_sweets / kcal_total_est,
      s_eggs          = kcal_eggs / kcal_total_est,
      s_animal_fat    = kcal_animal_fat / kcal_total_est,
      s_alcohol       = kcal_alcohol / kcal_total_est,
      
      HFD = s_fruit         * hf$fruit         * (1 - s_fruit) +
        s_veg           * hf$veg           * (1 - s_veg) +
        s_wholegrain    * hf$wholegrain    * (1 - s_wholegrain) +
        s_dairy         * hf$dairy         * (1 - s_dairy) +
        s_nuts_legumes  * hf$nuts_legumes  * (1 - s_nuts_legumes) +
        s_fish          * hf$fish          * (1 - s_fish) +
        s_poultry       * hf$poultry       * (1 - s_poultry) +
        s_veg_oil       * hf$veg_oil       * (1 - s_veg_oil) +
        s_tea_coffee    * hf$tea_coffee    * (1 - s_tea_coffee) +
        s_red_meat      * hf$red_meat      * (1 - s_red_meat) +
        s_refined_grain * hf$refined_grain * (1 - s_refined_grain) +
        s_potatoes      * hf$potatoes      * (1 - s_potatoes) +
        s_ssb           * hf$ssb           * (1 - s_ssb) +
        s_fruit_juice   * hf$fruit_juice   * (1 - s_fruit_juice) +
        s_sweets        * hf$sweets        * (1 - s_sweets) +
        s_eggs          * hf$eggs          * (1 - s_eggs) +
        s_animal_fat    * hf$animal_fat    * (1 - s_animal_fat) +
        s_alcohol       * hf$alcohol       * (1 - s_alcohol)
    )
  
  cat("    Range: ", round(min(df$HFD, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "-",
      round(max(df$HFD, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
  cat("    Mean:  ", round(mean(df$HFD, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
  
  return(df)
}

```
```{r}
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| echo: false
#| label: make_the_table


ffq_with_indices <- calculate_all_diet_indices(gu_cohort_data)

ffq_with_indices %>%
  select(AHEI, HEI_2015, aMED, PDI, hPDI, uPDI, animal_score, HFD) %>%
  summary()

for (idx in c("AHEI", "HEI_2015", "aMED", "PDI", "hPDI", "uPDI", "animal_score", "HFD")) {
  ffq_with_indices[[paste0(idx, "_z")]] <- scale(ffq_with_indices[[idx]])
  formula <- as.formula(paste0(
    "Surv(pfs_mo, pod_status) ~ ", idx, "_z + ageby10 + 
       ecog_1to5_final +
       cancer_RCCvsUC_NAME +
       stage.simplified.factor"
  ))
  fit <- coxph(formula, data = ffq_with_indices)
  cat("\n===", idx, "===\n")
  print(summary(fit)$conf.int[1, , drop = FALSE])
}

```
